name: Wes Farrell
description: American musician, songwriter, and record producer (1939–1996)
abstract: Wesley Donald Farrell (December 21, 1939 – February 29, 1996) was an American musician, songwriter and record producer, who was most active in the 1960s and 1970s.

works_created.t: Come On, Get Happy (Theme from "The Partridge Family")

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: there were sessions I did where I didn’t necessarily like — there were pop sessions we did. The ones that come to mind are the ones that we used to do with a guy named Wes Farrell
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]
